basics.description: Deploy Photostore into your own Azure subscription. Set a login email and password below — that is your sign-in, no Microsoft account or app registration required.

location.label: Region
location.toolTip: Azure region for the resource group and all resources.

basics.name: appName
basics.label: App name
basics.toolTip: Base name used as a prefix for resources. Lowercase letters and numbers only.

constraints.validationMessage: Use 3–17 lowercase letters and numbers only.

basics.name: adminEmail
basics.label: Login email
basics.toolTip: Used to sign in and to receive password-reset emails.

basics.name: adminPassword
basics.toolTip: At least 8 characters. You can change it later inside the app.

constraints.validationMessage: Password must be at least 8 characters.

basics.name: emailDataLocation
basics.label: Email data location
basics.toolTip: Where Azure Communication Services stores email data. Pick the option closest to you.
